summary: Write path moves to a tenant-scoped cache key but the read path still uses the old key shape.

comments.body: SessionReader.GetAsync still builds its key with SessionCacheKeys.ForUser, so sessions stored under ForTenantUser are never read back and stale ForUser entries keep serving cross-tenant state — the exact bug this PR sets out to fix. Update the read path (and invalidate old entries) in the same change.
